description: Design a 3-bladed wind turbine rotor (Radius = 2m, Hub = 0.2m) using a NACA 4412 airfoil (Re=500,000, Ncrit=9, 360-degree polar extrapolation). The rotor must feature linear taper and linear twist distributions. The objective is to achieve the Maximum Power Coefficient (Max Cp) at a Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) of 7.0 (±0.2). Save the project to '~/Documents/projects/tsr7_rotor.wpa', export the final blade geometry to '~/Documents/tsr7_geometry.txt', and export the BEM simulation results to '~/Documents/tsr7_bem_results.txt'.
